Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-13-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Motion for Default Judgment as to defendant Ricky Linzy Lee.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: L. Bareng. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3670. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Brian S. Healy, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff Spencer A. Lee whose appearance was waived for the August 13, 2020 Hearing at the last calling of the case on June 4, 2020.
No appearance by defendant Ricky Linzy Lee.
Plaintiff's Complaint to Quiet Title was filed on March 8, 2018 and served via Notice and Acknowledgment on March 12, 2018.
Default was entered at to defendant Ricky Linzy Lee on July 2, 2019.
DOE defendants 1 through 20 were DISMISSED without prejudice on January 28, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Spencer A. Lee, and against the defaulted defendant Ricky Linzy Lee.

Title of Real Property located at 767 42nd Avenue, San Francisco, CA solely in the name of the plaintiff Spencer A. Lee. Defendant Ricky Linzy Lee shall have no right, title, estate, lien or interest in the real property.

Counsel for plaintiff shall modify the proposed Interlocutory Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
